mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.user_id AS userId, t.teacher_number AS teacherNumber, t.title, t.department, t.research_area AS researchArea, t.introduction, t.created_time AS createdTime, t.updated_time AS updatedTime, u.real_name AS realName, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone FROM teachers t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id
AND t.teacher_number = #{q.teacherNumber}
AND t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.title}, '%')
AND t.department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.department}, '%')
ORDER BY t.created_time DESC

SELECT t.id, t.user_id AS userId, t.teacher_number AS teacherNumber, t.title, t.department, t.research_area AS researchArea, t.introduction, t.created_time AS createdTime, t.updated_time AS updatedTime, u.real_name AS realName, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone FROM teachers t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
select t.id from teachers t join users u on t.user_id = u.id where u.real_name = #{name}
select u.real_name from teachers t join users u on t.user_id = u.id where t.id = #{id}
select t.id from teachers t where t.user_id = #{userId}
